win_condition: First team to reach or exceed the target score threshold wins (commonly 10 points).
tiebreaker: If both teams cross threshold in same round, team with higher total points wins; if still tied, play one sudden-death round.

categories.label: Active Team Guess Points
categories.description: Points scored by active team from needle accuracy against target zone.

categories.label: Opponent Bonus/Steal Points
categories.description: Points scored by opposing team from bonus guess (left/right side or exact region, per rules variant).

categories.label: House Rule Modifiers
categories.description: Optional adjustments from chosen variant rules (if your group uses any).
